title: Medium Post
description: A post published on the Medium platform, including its content metadata, publishing status, tags, licensing, and authorship details.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the post by Medium.

title.description: The title of the post, limited to 100 characters.

contentFormat.description: The format of the content field, either HTML or Markdown.

content.description: The body content of the post in the format specified by contentFormat.

authorId.description: The unique identifier of the user who authored the post.

tags.description: Tags to classify the post, limited to a maximum of three tags with each up to 25 characters.

canonicalUrl.description: The original URL if this post was first published elsewhere, used for SEO canonical linking.

publishStatus.description: The publish status of the post. Public posts are visible to everyone, drafts are private, and unlisted posts are accessible only via direct link.

publishedAt.description: The timestamp in milliseconds when the post was published.

license.description: The license under which the post is published.

licenseUrl.description: The URL to the full text of the license under which the post is published.

url.description: The URL to the post on Medium.

publicationId.description: The unique identifier of the publication the post belongs to, if published within a publication.

notifyFollowers.description: Whether to notify the author's followers about the new post.
